description_long: This motorcycle features a sleek, aerodynamic design with a sharply contoured front fairing and integrated headlight assembly. The bodywork is predominantly dark with red accents, giving it a sporty and aggressive appearance. The seat is elongated and slightly raised at the rear, suitable for both rider and passenger, and the wheels are spoked with visible disc brakes on the front. The exhaust system is streamlined and positioned low along the right side, while the rear includes a compact fender and taillight. The handlebars are straight and positioned for an upright riding posture, with mirrors mounted on each side. Overall, the motorcycle is built for urban commuting and agile maneuvering, with a modern, performance-oriented aesthetic.
description: A sporty, dark-colored motorcycle with red accents, aerodynamic fairings, and a streamlined profile. It features disc brakes, a low exhaust, and an upright handlebar for urban riding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, headlight assembly, and handlebar width.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full bodywork, seat, rear fender, and wheel design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, rear fender, and the symmetry of the seat and handlebars.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the exhaust system, fairing contours, and wheel structure.
